• Runs a property prediction regression analysis (with figures and metrics).
• Analyzes structure latent-space mappings (with figures and summary
• Constructs and optimizes a synthetic process-yield surface (with a contour
• Saves all intermediate numerical outputs to outputs/ and a JSON summary to

• structure_latent_distributions.png – KDEs of latent spaces A and B.
• optimization_surface.png – temperature–time yield landscape with optima.
• Wrote the full research report as report/report.md, including:
